description: Maps every learnable concept to: KB article, scenario, Docker Compose state, and tier. Powers concept-first navigation — user picks a concept, app boots the right broken system.

cache-aside.title: Cache-Aside Pattern
cache-aside.description: App checks cache before DB. On miss, fetches from DB and writes to cache.

thundering-herd.title: Thundering Herd / Cache Stampede
thundering-herd.description: Many requests hit DB simultaneously when a popular cache key expires.

hot-key.title: Hot Key Problem
hot-key.description: One cache key receives disproportionate traffic, saturating a single Redis shard.

connection-pool-exhaustion.title: Connection Pool Exhaustion
connection-pool-exhaustion.description: DB max_connections saturated; new requests queue or fail.

db-indexing-btree.title: B-Tree Indexing
db-indexing-btree.description: How Postgres B-tree indexes accelerate point lookups and range scans.

lsm-tree.title: LSM Tree & Compaction (Cassandra)
lsm-tree.description: Write-optimized storage: commit log → memtable → SSTable flush → compaction I/O spike.

async-queues.title: Async Queues & Write Decoupling
async-queues.description: Decouple writes from synchronous request path using a message queue.

backpressure.title: Backpressure & Load Shedding
backpressure.description: Producer slows or sheds load when consumer queue fills.

fan-out-on-write.title: Fan-out on Write vs Read
fan-out-on-write.description: Pre-compute and push to followers at write time vs pull at read time. Trade-offs for write amplification vs read latency.

eventual-consistency.title: Eventual Consistency
eventual-consistency.description: Replicas converge to same state without synchronous coordination. Stale reads are possible.

token-bucket.title: Token Bucket Rate Limiting
token-bucket.description: Redis-based token bucket: atomic DECR + TTL per key. Allows bursts up to bucket size.

sliding-window.title: Sliding Window Rate Limiting
sliding-window.description: Sorted set in Redis tracks request timestamps. More accurate than fixed window, higher memory cost.

distributed-rate-limiting.title: Distributed Rate Limiting
distributed-rate-limiting.description: Rate limit across multiple app nodes using Redis as shared counter. Race conditions without Lua/atomic ops.

presigned-urls.title: Presigned URLs & Direct Upload
presigned-urls.description: Client uploads directly to S3 using a time-limited signed URL. App never handles blob data.

multipart-upload.title: Multipart Upload
multipart-upload.description: Split large files into parts, upload in parallel, server assembles. Required for >5GB files on S3.

cdn-caching.title: CDN Edge Caching & Origin Protection
cdn-caching.description: Cache blobs at edge nodes. Origin protection prevents cache-bypass attacks overwhelming S3.

kafka-partitions.title: Kafka Partitions & Consumer Groups
kafka-partitions.description: Partitions enable parallel consumption. Consumer group divides partitions across instances.

at-least-once-delivery.title: At-Least-Once Delivery & Idempotency
at-least-once-delivery.description: Kafka retries on failure, so consumers may see duplicate messages. Idempotent processing required.

offset-management.title: Kafka Offset Management & Consumer Lag
offset-management.description: Consumers commit offsets. Lag = how far behind production. Partition rebalancing causes lag spikes.

inverted-index.title: Inverted Index & Full-Text Search
inverted-index.description: Elasticsearch maps terms to document IDs. Index refresh lag means writes not immediately searchable.

relevance-scoring.title: Relevance Scoring (TF-IDF / BM25)
relevance-scoring.description: Elasticsearch scores documents by term frequency and inverse document frequency. Tuning affects result quality.

index-refresh-lag.title: Index Refresh Lag & Shard Routing
index-refresh-lag.description: Elasticsearch refreshes every 1s by default. Writes not searchable until refresh. Shard routing affects write hot spots.

two-phase-commit.title: Two-Phase Commit (2PC)
two-phase-commit.description: Coordinator asks all participants to prepare, then commits. Blocking if coordinator fails.

saga-pattern.title: Saga Pattern
saga-pattern.description: Sequence of local transactions with compensating rollbacks. No distributed lock needed.

idempotency-keys.title: Idempotency Keys
idempotency-keys.description: Client sends unique key per request. Server deduplicates retries. Critical for payment/transfer APIs.

read-replicas.title: Read Replicas
read-replicas.description: Route reads to replica, writes to primary. Replica lag means stale reads possible.

consistent-hashing.title: Consistent Hashing
consistent-hashing.description: Distributes keys across nodes such that adding/removing a node remaps minimal keys.

sse-realtime.title: Server-Sent Events (SSE)
sse-realtime.description: Server pushes events over HTTP keep-alive. One-directional, simpler than WebSockets.
sse-realtime.note: Used by SystemCraft itself for metrics stream — meta-learning opportunity
